email_subject: Application for IT Account Manager – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Ben Van Beek,

I am writing to apply for the IT Account Manager position at Kingfisher Recruitment, as advertised. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and web development, I have developed strong analytical and client-facing skills that align well with this role.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites for clients. I also run my own project, mirook.com, where I apply technical SEO and GEO audits to improve search visibility. These experiences have honed my ability to understand client needs, analyze market requirements, and deliver tailored solutions.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am eager to bring my technical insight and client-oriented mindset to help your client's software solutions drive digitalization for their customers.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills can contribute to your team. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Ben Van Beek,

I am excited to apply for the IT Account Manager position at Kingfisher Recruitment. With a strong foundation in digital marketing, SEO, and web development, combined with a client-centric approach, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your client's software solutions team.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build and maintain WordPress websites for clients. This role has sharpened my ability to understand client requirements, analyze market trends, and deliver solutions that drive measurable results. I also independently run mirook.com, where I implement structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to enhance visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. These projects have given me hands-on experience with SaaS-like tools and a deep appreciation for how software can optimize business processes.

Your job description emphasizes analytical thinking, client communication, and the ability to work both independently and in a team. My experience aligns well: I regularly analyze search performance data using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to guide decisions, and I collaborate closely with clients to ensure their websites meet business goals. I am also comfortable with the commercial aspects, having contributed to content strategies that support client acquisition.

I hold a Bachelor's-level coursework in Applied Computer Science and have a technical background that includes front-end development. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am eager to bring my technical insight and client-oriented mindset to help your client's integrated platform drive digitalization for their niche sector.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills can benefit your team. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
• First experience with software products: built and maintained WordPress sites for clients, applying SEO and content strategies to meet business requirements.
• Analytical mindset: use Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to analyze market data and guide decisions.
• Client-oriented communicator: manage client relationships at Episto, understanding their needs and delivering tailored solutions.
• Self-starter with project ownership: independently run mirook.com, from design to technical SEO/GEO audits.
• Bachelor-level coursework in Applied Computer Science, with front-end development experience (AngularJS, JavaScript).
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites, acting as a key point of contact for client needs. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

## Core skills
- Client communication & relationship management: understanding client requirements, advising on solutions, and delivering tailored outcomes
- Analytical & market analysis: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads for data-driven decisions
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
